clinicalFoundation.population: A preschooler who clings at the classroom door because goodbye feels like the floor might drop away.
clinicalFoundation.trigger: Morning drop-off when other children walk in more easily.

therapeuticIntention.because: Their body can learn the pattern: goodbye, then return, then hug.

clinicalFoundation.creativeVision: A small paper star in the cubby that only appears after pick-up time.
clinicalFoundation.oneTrueThing: The teacher saves a soft hello for the hardest mornings.

mustNeverList: No forced push into the room without consent

supportingCharacters.functionalRole: Names the next small step at the door
